author: psovit
description: Generate a Business Model Canvas layout inside a new Canvas file. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sovit Poudel - @psovit
manifest.description: Generate a Business Model Canvas layout inside a new Canvas file.
manifest.name: Strategist Toolkit

name: Strategist Toolkit

releases.author: psovit
releases.description:
🚀 Features

Business Model Canvas (BMC) Generator: Instantly create a professionally laid out Business Model Canvas inside a new Obsidian Canvas file.
Strategic Layout: Pre-configured with the standard 9 blocks (Key Partners, Value Propositions, etc.) at a readable scale.
Actionable Prompts: Each block includes built-in guiding questions to kickstart your brainstorming session.
Workflow-Friendly: Automatically creates and opens the new canvas file so you can start mapping your ideas immediately.

releases.author: psovit
releases.description:
## 🚀 Features
- **Business Model Canvas (BMC) Generator**: Instantly create a professionally laid out Business Model Canvas inside a new Obsidian Canvas file.
- **Strategic Layout**: Pre-configured with the standard 9 blocks (Key Partners, Value Propositions, etc.) at a readable scale.
- **Actionable Prompts**: Each block includes built-in guiding questions to kickstart your brainstorming session.
- **Workflow-Friendly**: Automatically creates and opens the new canvas file so you can start mapping your ideas immediately.
